tagline: Enhanced AI capabilities for compliance-focused workspaces.
what_it_does: The `ai_extract` and `ai_classify` SQL functions are now enabled by default in workspaces with the compliance security profile activated. `ai_extract` allows users to extract structured fields from unstructured text based on a user-defined schema, while `ai_classify` categorizes text into predefined labels for efficient document management. These functions support various compliance standards, enhancing their applicability in regulated environments.
why_it_matters: This update significantly improves the ability of organizations to manage and classify unstructured data in compliance-heavy industries, thereby enhancing productivity and reducing the risk of non-compliance. By automating the extraction and classification processes, businesses can streamline workflows, improve data governance, and ensure adherence to regulatory requirements.
plain_summary: AI functions for extracting and classifying text are now available by default for compliant workspaces.

capabilities.title: Structured Data Extraction
capabilities.desc: Use `ai_extract` to pull structured fields from unstructured text.

capabilities.title: Text Classification
capabilities.desc: Utilize `ai_classify` to categorize text into user-defined labels.

capabilities.title: Agent Creation
capabilities.desc: Create information extraction and classification agents for automated workflows.

capabilities.title: Compliance Support
capabilities.desc: Functions support multiple compliance standards including HIPAA and PCI-DSS.

prerequisites: Access to a serverless usage policy with a nonzero budget
Unstructured data in a Unity Catalog volume or table
use_cases: Classifying customer call transcripts by intent
limitations: Function availability may vary by region
Requires at least one unlabeled document or row in Unity Catalog to build an agent
Must have at least two labels defined to run classification

steps.title: Create Agent
steps.desc: Go to Agents and select Create Agent for Text Classification.

steps.title: Select Source Data
steps.desc: Choose a volume with documents or a table with text data.

steps.title: Configure Labels
steps.desc: Add and refine classification labels for your data.

steps.title: Run Classification
steps.desc: Save and run the classification to see results.

steps.title: Use Agent
steps.desc: Deploy the agent for large-scale classification tasks.

key_takeaway: The availability of AI extract and classify functions by default enhances data management capabilities for compliance-focused organizations.
